description: Catalog of ops library health metrics. Each metric corresponds to a governance dimension from ALG-13.

dimensions.name: Identity Completeness
dimensions.description: All ops units have stable IDs, versions, owners, and lifecycle states.

dimensions.name: Registry Integrity
dimensions.description: All active ops units are present in the ops registry with no duplicates or orphans.

dimensions.name: Applicability Precision
dimensions.description: All ops units have explicit applicability declarations (project types, stages, risk classes).

dimensions.name: Dependency Clarity
dimensions.description: All cross-library dependencies are explicitly declared with typed edges.

dimensions.name: Proof Sufficiency
dimensions.description: All ops units have defined proof requirements and those proofs can be satisfied.

dimensions.name: Backcompat Discipline
dimensions.description: All ops unit changes carry a compatibility label and supersession chain is intact.

dimensions.name: Maintenance Readiness
dimensions.description: Ops library is compatible with all required maintenance modes (coverage audit, drift detection, backcompat validation, registry rebuild, registry cleanup).

dimensions.name: Observability Coverage
dimensions.description: Ops library emits decision reports, health signals, and is observable by telemetry.

current_assessment.notes: Score reflects pre-upgrade state. Target is 85 after full Phase 1 doctrine upgrade.
